query: What does a commercial build-out cost and involve?
answer_block:
TL;DR: What a commercial build-out costs and involves

Across the major Texas metros, commercial build-outs run roughly $50 to $310 per sq ft, depending on city and finish level. Basic build-outs sit at the low end, mid-range projects in the middle, and high-end or specialized work at the top. What it involves is a step-by-step process: initial consultation, design and architectural planning, permitting and approvals, demolition, the construction phase, and a final punch list with inspections before handover.

CityBasic build-outMid-rangeHigh-end / specialized
Houston$55-$95 per sq ft$95-$160 per sq ft$160-$280 per sq ft
Dallas$55-$95 per sq ft$95-$155 per sq ft$155-$270 per sq ft
Fort Worth$52-$88 per sq ft$88-$145 per sq ft$145-$250 per sq ft
Austin$65-$110 per sq ft$110-$180 per sq ft$180-$310 per sq ft
San Antonio$50-$85 per sq ft$85-$140 per sq ft$140-$240 per sq ft
answer_block_plain:
TL;DR: What a commercial build-out costs and involves. Across the major Texas metros, commercial build-outs run roughly $50 to $310 per sq ft, depending on city and finish level. Basic build-outs sit at the low end, mid-range projects in the middle, and high-end or specialized work at the top. What it involves is a step-by-step process: initial consultation, design and architectural planning, permitting and approvals, demolition, the construction phase, and a final punch list with inspections before handover.

Texas commercial build-out cost by city (per sq ft):
- Houston: Basic $55-$95 | Mid-range $95-$160 | High-end $160-$280
- Dallas: Basic $55-$95 | Mid-range $95-$155 | High-end $155-$270
- Fort Worth: Basic $52-$88 | Mid-range $88-$145 | High-end $145-$250
- Austin: Basic $65-$110 | Mid-range $110-$180 | High-end $180-$310
- San Antonio: Basic $50-$85 | Mid-range $85-$140 | High-end $140-$240
